body_html:
ok

--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Any interest in making a reservation for the S-76D
which is the S-76C++ with 

  1.             the  following additional

features:
"(a) Composite main rotor blades with improved
aerodynamic performance
(b) Quiet Tail Rotor (QTR) technologies
(c) Optionally-available Rotor Ice Protection System
(RIPS)
(d) An advanced, integrated digital cockpit system
with multi-function
displays
(e) A new engine, the PW210, replacing the current
Turbomeca 2S1/2S2 series,
with improved power available while preserving the
range of the present
(2S2-powered) S-76C++.
The combination of the above features is predicted
to afford operators with
extended range and improved payload over the S-76C+
in those conditions
presently limited by aircraft performance. Sikorsky
predicts an improvement in
useful load of 1,000 lbs over that of the S-76C+
assuming Category A performance
at ISA + 20 degrees centigrade. The maximum
take-off gross weight
limitation of 11,700 lbs. will remain in effect."
It is expected that the Baseline Helicopter Price
of the 76D will be not
greater than 10% above the current list price of
the S-76C++, which is
$8,450,000 in 2007, adjusted for escalation to the
year of the Estimated Completion
Services Date.
Based on informal conversations with the Sikorsky
team at your home the
other day, we are talking about delivery dates in
or about 2010, perhaps
earlier.
$100,000 deposit is required for reserving a
position for the 76D. Pursuant
to the attached agreement the deposit is
non-refundable, except for certain
failures on the part of Sikorsky described in the
attached agreement.

Darren K. Indyke
Attorney-At-Law
457 Madison Avenue
4th Floor
New York, New York 10022
Tel: 212-750-1176
Fax: 212-750-0381
e-mail: dkiesq@aol.com (mailto:dkiesq@aol.com)

Confidentiality Notice: This communication and any
attachments contain
information from Darren K. Indyke, Esq. that
constitute attorney work product or
that are otherwise confidential and/or privileged.
Except for personal use by
the intended recipient, or as expressly authorized
by the sender, any person
who receives this information is prohibited from
disclosing, copying,
distributing, and/or using it. If you have received
this communication in error,
please immediately delete it and all copies, and
promptly notify the sender at
the above telephone number or electronic mail
address. Nothing in this
communication is intended to operate as an
electronic signature under applicable
law.
